scripts.desktop:web: pnpm --dir web run build:desktop && RUSTC_WRAPPER= cargo build --manifest-path desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml && desktop/src-tauri/target/debug/bifrost-desktop
scripts.desktop:build:app: node scripts/ensure-root-dev-deps.mjs && pnpm --dir web run build:desktop && cargo build -p bifrost-cli --release && node scripts/prepare-tauri-sidecar.mjs release && pnpm exec tauri build --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json --bundles app
scripts.desktop:build: node scripts/ensure-root-dev-deps.mjs && pnpm --dir web run build:desktop && cargo build -p bifrost-cli --release && node scripts/prepare-tauri-sidecar.mjs release && pnpm exec tauri build --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.desktop:dev: node scripts/ensure-root-dev-deps.mjs && pnpm --dir web run build:desktop && cargo build -p bifrost-cli && node scripts/prepare-tauri-sidecar.mjs debug && pnpm exec tauri dev --config desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
scripts.release:all: pnpm run cli:build && pnpm run desktop:build
